message:
fix(bundle): correct byte order in read_u64 for bundle metadata parsing

Change read_u64() from little-endian to big-endian byte order to match
the bundle format specification.

The bundle format uses network byte order (big-endian) for multi-byte
integers in the header and metadata sections. The read_u64 helper was
incorrectly using from_le_bytes() which would cause incorrect parsing
of bundle metadata on little-endian systems (most common architectures).

This fix ensures:
- Correct parsing of blob sizes in bundle headers
- Correct parsing of manifest lengths
- Consistent behavior across different CPU architectures
- Interoperability with bundles created on any platform

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
